title: Lead Revenue Manager at Beyond Wildlife India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Beyond Wildlife India
jsonLd.description:
We at Beyond Wildlife India are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Beyond Wildlife India:
Beyond Wildlife India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India!
